creator: scott.loga@me.com
text:
After the most recent update to kmail-20.08.0, kmail no longer launches when executed.  When executed via command line, I receive the following message - ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libKF5Libkdepim.so.5" not found, required by "kmail

If additional information is need, please don't hesitate to ask.

Rgs,

Scott
